name: E&S Food
message: E&S Food, Inc., was started in 1980 by Settimo Guttilla, selling grated cheese from his car and his first warehouse was his garage. Now utilizing a warehouse over 50,000 square feet, E&S has over3,000 products, and the company employs over 50 employees.We are going to upload 190GB of corporate data. A lot of financial and accounting data, credit card details, personal information of employees, client information, a bit of client data, NDAs, etc.
